'''Yavin 7''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]]. It was one of four moons of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] shown on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I's]] tactical map during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

{{Moon-stub}}

==Appearances==
